platform_decisions.content: WebFetch preapproved hosts split into hostname-only set + path-prefix map for O(1) lookups; preapproval does not inherit to sandbox
RemoteTriggerTool wraps claude.ai trigger API with 5 actions, org UUID required, feature-gated
Cron deterministic jitter: recurring up to 10% late (max 15min), off-minute to reduce thundering herd
Cron dual kill-switches: isKairosCronEnabled for scheduler, isDurableCronEnabled for persistence
Cron jobs default session-only (in-memory); persistence requires explicit user intent
Brief tool requires BOTH explicit opt-in AND entitlement check; assistant mode bypasses opt-in
Todo verification nudge: after closing 3+ tasks with no verification, append reminder
NotebookEdit enforces read-before-write invariant; blocks if file modified externally since read
Notebook cell ID auto-generated for nbformat >= 4.5; post-write breaks FileRead dedup cache
Companion deterministic from hash(userId); only soul persisted, bones regenerated — immune to config tampering
Vim state machine encoded as exhaustive TypeScript union types — types ARE the spec
Vim count saturation at MAX_VIM_COUNT (10000) during parsing to prevent unbounded multipliers
Computer use global lock with stale-PID recovery and race-safe atomic create
Computer use lock deferred acquisition: check without acquire, separate try-acquire step
Computer use subscription tier gating: Max/Pro required, coordinate mode frozen at first read
Terminal surrogate host pattern exempts terminal from hide/screenshot in computer use
Computer use clipboard verify-after-write: read-back check detects silent write failure
Computer use animated mouse: ease-out-cubic at 60fps, distance-proportional duration, 0.5s cap
Computer use CFRunLoop draining for Swift calls so window-manager events flush (max 1.1s)
Vim text object types as explicit named set for exhaustive pattern matching
Output style Markdown frontmatter templating with keep-coding-instructions merge flag
API provider environment cascading: Bedrock then Vertex then Foundry then firstParty
